mapper.select: select dependency_type, count(*) AS calledNums from astschema.dependency_table where output_id = #{id} group by dependency_type
select page_name as pageName, expression from client_side_schema.el_expression_table left join client_side_schema.page_table pt on pt.id = el_expression_table.page_id
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'annotation-statistics'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'web-xml-analysis'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'file-store-analysis'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'persistence-analysis'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'ejb-jar-analysis'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'pom-xml-analysis'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'faces-config-analysis'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsp-file-count'
SELECT * FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsf-file-count'
mapper.insert: insert into hybridanalysis.analysis_results (name, create_time, update_time, user_id, source_folder_id, parse_output_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{createTime},#{updateTime},#{userId},#{sourceFolderId},#{parseOutputId}, #{path})
mapper.update:
update hybridanalysis.analysis_results
name = #{name},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
user_id = #{userId},
source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId},
parse_output_id = #{parseOutputId},
path = #{path},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'annotation-statistics'
DELETE FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'web-xml-analysis'
DELETE FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'file-store-analysis'
DELETE FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'persistence-analysis'
DELETE FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'ejb-jar-analysis'
DELETE FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'pom-xml-analysis'
DELETE FROM hybridanalysis.analysis_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'faces-config-analysis'
